message:
feat(membrane): add 39 formal proof tests for SOS certificates, barrier invariance, and HJI viability

Adds comprehensive formal verification tests across 4 runtime math modules:

- hji_reachability (11 proofs): Bellman fixed-point, viability kernel maximality,
  forward invariance under optimal play, value iteration convergence, unsafe set
  completeness, volume partition, adversary witness soundness, encode/decode
  bijection, transition closure, origin steady-state

- sos_barrier (14 proofs): exhaustive PSD non-negativity for all 3 certificates,
  Cholesky stability bounds, fixed-point precision, barrier separation, certificate
  integrity, Gram symmetry, saturating arithmetic monotonicity, budget sufficiency

- sos_invariant (10 proofs): Gram matrix structure verification (positive diagonal,
  non-positive off-diagonal for incoherence-detecting indefinite forms), exhaustive
  form boundedness, stress monotonicity in divergence, EWMA convergence bounds,
  cross-invariant independence, violation counter monotonicity, state machine
  reachability

- barrier (5 proofs): admissibility monotonicity in risk, guard conjunction
  necessity, mode coverage completeness, profile escalation safety

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
